features: OFFICIAL WICKED THEME JEWELLERY KIT: Step into the magical world of the Wizard of Oz with this officially licensed Wicked craft set – perfect for young fans of the hit musical!

COMPLETE SET WITH STORAGE CASE: Includes everything needed to make a unique charm bracelet or necklace – assorted beads, alphabet letters, heart and star beads, charms, elastic thread, and a reusable gift box.
COLOURFUL & CREATIVE FUN: Features a mix of colours like green, pink, blue, purple, and lilac – ideal for kids who love vibrant DIY projects and imaginative play.
EASY TO USE FOR AGES 5+: Designed for children aged 5 and above – a fun, hands-on way to improve fine motor skills and inspire artistic confidence through jewellery making.
PERFECT GIFT FOR GIRLS WHO LOVE CRAFTS: Whether for a birthday, Christmas, or just because, this Wicked jewellery set makes a magical gift and a treasured keepsake.
SAFE & CHILD-FRIENDLY MATERIALS: Made from durable plastic and rubber, all components are safe for supervised use and designed for repeated creative fun.
INSPIRED BY THE BELOVED MUSICAL: Captures the charm of Wicked and the Wizard of Oz universe – a must-have for any little Glinda or Elphaba fan!
description: Unleash your creativity with the Wicked Jewellery Making Set – a fun and simple way to craft your own unique accessories. Perfect for adding a personal touch to your style! Step into the magical world of the Wizard of Oz with this officially licensed Wicked craft set – perfect for young fans of the hit musical! Features a mix of colours like green, pink, blue, purple, and lilac – ideal for kids who love vibrant DIY projects and imaginative play. Designed for children aged 5 and above – a fun, hands-on way to improve fine motor skills and inspire artistic confidence through jewellery making. Whether for a birthday, Christmas, or just because, this Wicked jewellery set makes a magical gift and a treasured keepsake.
